title: Tool Design, Errors, Pagination, and Context Efficiency · Extension System Mission
summary: A documentation engineering group. The group needs efficient resource search and narrow update tools with typed errors and protocol tests. Planned artifact: Deliver Local Knowledge MCP Server with acceptance evidence, rubric defense, reflection, and a changed-constraint extension. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Distinguish host, per-server client, server, model, user, and external service responsibilities.
Expose readable addressable context as resources or templates rather than action tools.
Test discovery, valid calls, invalid arguments, errors, concurrency, and shutdown.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:

options.text: Reject the unsupported conclusion, name the violated Pagination Filtering condition, repair the responsible layer, and rerun the boundary trace.

steps.title: Defend the stakeholder delivery
steps.instruction: Write a concise evidence note that explains when Pagination Filtering applies, what can fail, and how the changed case was verified.
steps.why: Retrieval and explanation expose gaps that recognition questions can hide.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Provide filters, pagination, summaries, and stable identifiers for large result sets.
